prompt: I'm writing a gh-aw workflow that creates PRs from agent output. The PRs need to trigger CI, and the agent shouldn't be able to modify our .github/ directory or approve its own PRs. What's the right configuration?

assertions.text: Explains github-token-for-extra-empty-commit with PAT or GitHub App token to trigger CI on agent-created PRs
Explains WHY agent-created PRs don't trigger CI (GITHUB_TOKEN pushes are ignored by Actions)
Recommends protected-files on create-pull-request to block .github/ modifications
Recommends allowed-events: [COMMENT, REQUEST_CHANGES] on submit-pull-request-review to block agent approvals
Provides concrete YAML safe-outputs configuration example
